User.title: User
User.description: Represents an authenticated user in Arohi AI and stores their career progress, bookmarks, and mock application history.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Authentication

profile.description: User profile details like phone, location, education, activeGoal

enrolledCourses.description: List of courses user is enrolled in

completedModules.description: List of completed module IDs from skills/courses

checkedChecklist.description: List of checked career progress checklist IDs

arohiChats.description: User's past chat sessions with Arohi AI

arohiCalls.description: User's past voice call summaries with Arohi AI

VoiceCallLog.title: VoiceCallLog
VoiceCallLog.description: Detailed transcription and career/business analysis generated from real-time live voice sessions.

uid.description: User ID of the caller or guest

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the call log creation

turns.description: List of conversational dialogue turns between caller and Arohi AI

analysis.description: AI-generated strategic summaries, action plans, priorities, and career-related flags

/users/{userId}.description: Active user profiles containing career progress, bookmarks, and application history.

/voice_call_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trails and rich career-intent dialogue logs for real-time live voice calls.
